extortion.description: Established in 1986, CMG Drainage Engineering stands as a prominent Civil Engineering consulting firm nestled in Tucson, Arizona, United States. For over three decades, CMG has been dedicated to providing exceptional water resource engineering services to both public and private sectors across Central and Southern Arizona. Strategically headquartered at 3555 North Mountain Avenue in Tucson, CMG oversees and manages a wide array of projects, offering comprehensive solutions tailored to meet the diverse needs of its clientele.
